horoscope: Today's Moon occurs in your solar third house, dear Aries, and you're motivated to make valuable, happy connections and contacts, learn new things, improve your skills, and come up with new ideas. You more readily reach out to others and find opportunities and benefits in the process in the week ahead. It's a fine time for writing, beginning new courses, projects, and interests, speaking engagements, and making friends.  You can feel a strong desire for more variety in your life, or transportation opportunities can emerge. In some cases, there can be a breakdown or shutdown of a mode of transportation or communication, which in turn prompts the need to do things differently, with associated opportunities and new experiences. This New Moon also encourages you to put more of your personality into your communications.

Today's New Moon occurs in your resources sector, dear Taurus, which is an area of your solar chart that holds dominion over money, talents, comfort, and security. New Moons can bring about new beginnings or slate-clearing events that prompt a new attitude or approach to certain areas of your life, making this a good time for resolutions related to business, finances, and boosting your sense of security. The week ahead is particularly suitable for managing your money and valuables. If you're looking to earn more, this is a good time to explore new channels. You can quite effectively take charge of your practical affairs at this time. As well, your natural talents are likely to be in demand, and you have a strong sense for using them resourcefully and to your advantage. You'll find more motivation to make yourself feel more secure and comfortable with this New Moon.

Today's New Moon occurs in your sign, dear Gemini, pointing to a personal new beginning or a sense that you have a new lease on life. It's a time for confidence boosts, for changing the way you greet the world if it benefits you, and for taking charge of your life in key ways. You are more noticeable and dynamic than usual, and people appreciate you. Make plans to pay more attention to your own needs and happiness during this period when some healthy self-focus is especially appropriate. It's an opportunity for renewal, and it's also a fine time to make some solid resolutions. Chances are good that you've been feeling ready for a reboot or restart, and this New Moon may very well be it.

A New Moon occurs in your soul sector, dear Cancer, and you have a blast of new energy with you for dealing with the past or private matters. It's also a prompt to let go of things you no longer need and to attend to your mental and emotional wellness. The week ahead is good for purging, healing, and clearing the decks for next month's New Moon that will occur in your sign and bring about a new personal beginning. It's time for winding-down activities and more time to yourself for personal reflection. You may be saying goodbye to something, figuratively speaking, and clearing the decks for new beginnings with a New Moon occurring tonight in your solar twelfth house, a sector that rules the endings of matters, as well as a deeper level of understanding. Before the New Moon tonight, it's best to take stock rather than begin all-new endeavors.

There has been a strong focus on your connections to friends and groups in recent weeks, dear Leo, and quite possibly, your long-term goals as well. It can be an important time in your life for collaboration. The New Moon today brings the take-charge energy you need to put a plan in motion, as well as inspiration for new ideas and goals to work towards. Your sense of community is strong, and emotional satisfaction can come through your interactions with, or support of, friends and associates. The coming week is strong for new starts, publishing efforts, studies and courses, and making personal changes. Take your time today and tomorrow making sense of this new energy.

In recent weeks, the Sun in your solar tenth house of career, life path, responsibilities, and reputation has ignited your interest in and drawn your attention to your goals and ambitions, dear Virgo. Today's New Moon supplies you with the boost or motivation to improve, take charge of, and grow these things. Breathing new life into a plan, project, or business can be in focus in the coming week. Moving your work forward is invigorating now, and opportunities for improving your image or reputation can surface. There may be new obligations, recognition, or a new position or project. It can be a time to come into the limelight in some way, or you'll find others noticing you for your performance and actions.

Today's New Moon harmonizes with your sign, dear Libra, and is a pleasant, gently motivating influence. Unusual activities or those that take you out of your routine can be particularly beneficial. Publishing, sharing ideas, learning new things, and visiting new places can be particularly favorable, leading to new beginnings and a breath of fresh air in the week ahead. You might make an effort to initiate new projects or activities that expand your mind, feed your spirit for adventure, and stretch your imagination. You may feel renewed by a new perspective on your life now. It's an excellent time for an attitude change for the better, positive feelings, optimism, and a stronger sense of purpose or meaning.

Today is strong for reflecting upon your closest relationships and what you've learned in the recent weeks, not only about others, dear Scorpio, but your own contribution to, or feelings about, a partnership. A New Moon occurs tonight, and it will bring a new focus into your world, as well as more courage and motivation to pursue goals, especially related to self-mastery and improvement. Financial and intimate matters are in focus, and while challenges and obstacles may arise, a take-charge attitude is bound to emerge. Before this New Moon, it's important to wind down and reflect or take stock rather than attempt to push ahead. The week ahead is strong for finding new ways to connect with a partner, pay off debts, get a loan, or seek out emotional support. Take your time on this, however. It's too soon to go hard with these things, so make plans.

Today's New Moon can reinvigorate your social life and communications, dear Sagittarius, or your feeling of connectedness with others and hopes for the future. It can prompt new beginnings or fresh directions related to your close relationships and partnerships. This lunation can point to a new or renewed connection in your life, or it can be about fresh negotiations and a stronger feeling for what you want from (and can bring to) a relationship. You are in a good position to team up with someone, boost a current partnership, and benefit from counseling or consultations. It's also a fine time to see yourself through others' eyes and find ways to bring more balance, harmony, and beauty into your life in general.

There has been a stronger emphasis on habits, routine, health, skills, and work in your life in the past few weeks, dear Capricorn. The New Moon later today ushers in an opportunity to put new initiatives into action in these areas. A new project or program might launch to help you improve your well-being in vital ways. You can now feel strongly that it's time to take better care of yourself! Improving daily routines plays a big role in this. You could be loving what you do now, and bringing new, more creative, take-charge energy to your work or daily life. There can be new tasks or priorities that invigorate you in the week ahead.

A New Moon occurs later today, dear Aquarius, and it points to new directions or beginnings related to creative projects, hobbies, romance, dating, or leisure time for you. It motivates you to make more time to "play" or to pursue creative and expressive activities. Pursuing your passions is in focus now and in the week ahead. Consider making a resolution to listen to your heart, express yourself more openly, or enjoy leisure time more often. There may be opportunities for new or renewed romance, or creative channels may open up. In fact, you may be making these things happen. It can be a time to attract positive attention from others, especially on creative or romantic levels, and it's a time for a fresh start.

Today's New Moon occurs in your sector of home and family, dear Pisces, and it brings fresh energy into your life for personal and domestic pursuits. This is a time when you can learn deep things, not only about your current affairs but also about your life path and direction, by getting in touch with your true feelings. In many ways, you can think of this New Moon as a push to reconnect with yourself. It's a time to check in with your feelings and comfort levels before pressing forward. On another, more literal level, this can be a good time to start fresh on home projects or to reorganize or remodel your living space. There can be a move, preparations for an eventual relocation, or the resolve to become more active with family or to take more time off for enjoying home life.
